pairs.question: Who was the head coach of the 2024–25 Florida Gators men's basketball team and what was their tenure?
pairs.answer: The head coach of the 2024–25 Florida Gators men's basketball team was Todd Golden, who was in his third year as head coach during that season.

pairs.question: What was the regular season record for the Florida Gators during the 2024–25 season and how did they finish in the SEC?
pairs.answer: The Florida Gators posted a 27–4 regular season record in 2024–25 and finished second in the SEC, which was noted as the most difficult SEC season in conference history.

pairs.question: What significant first did the Florida Gators achieve by beating Auburn in the 2024–25 season?
pairs.answer: By defeating Auburn on the road, the Florida Gators became the first team in program history to beat a No. 1-ranked opponent on the road.

pairs.question: Describe the Florida Gators' performance in the 2025 NCAA tournament, including their seeding and key wins.
pairs.answer: The Florida Gators entered the 2025 NCAA tournament as the No. 1 seed in the West region. They defeated Norfolk State (95–69), UConn (77–75), Maryland (87–71), Texas Tech (84–79), and Auburn (79–73) en route to winning the national championship.

pairs.question: How did the Florida Gators overcome their deficit in the 2025 NCAA championship game against Houston?
pairs.answer: Trailing by 12 points late in the second half of the 2025 NCAA championship game, the Florida Gators rallied to win 65–63 by outscoring Houston in the final minutes and securing their third national title overall.

pairs.question: What was the team's motto for the 2024–25 season and what historical significance did it hold?
pairs.answer: The team's motto for the 2024–25 season was 'Gator Boys Stay Hot,' which paid homage to the Florida team that won back-to-back championships 18 years prior in 2006 and 2007.

pairs.question: Provide the names of the senior guards who led the Florida Gators during the 2024–25 season.
pairs.answer: The senior guards who led the Florida Gators during the 2024–25 season were Walter Clayton Jr., Will Richard, and Alijah Martin.
